decisions.briefing: Markets drifted mildly lower today — NASDAQ -0.7%, S&P 500 -0.3% — a quiet, low-conviction session with no strong catalyst. With cash at $477 (just under the $500 buy threshold), no new positions can be opened today. Existing holdings remain intact with the portfolio up 31.6%; we hold and let momentum work.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted modest losses in a directionless session as investors maintained a cautious stance amid mixed economic signals and thin summer trading volume. Tech underperformed, dragging the NASDAQ down 0.7%, while the broader S&P 500 slipped 0.3% with no single sector driving the move. With no major macro catalyst on the tape, markets remained in a holding pattern as participants awaited fresh data to establish the next trend.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市今日走勢疲弱，在缺乏明確催化劑的情況下小幅收跌。科技板塊表現落後，拖累納斯達克指數下跌0.7%，標普500指數亦微跌0.3%。市場成交清淡，投資者態度審慎，等待新的宏觀經濟數據出爐以尋找方向指引，整體氣氛維持觀望。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) measures how fast a stock has been rising on a scale of 0–100. When RSI climbs above 70, the stock is considered 'overbought' — it has moved up so sharply in a short period that a pullback or consolidation becomes likely. Today's screener showed over a dozen candidates (FOUR, EWTX, KBH, NTRA, ICLR, AAL, and more) in overbought territory — which is why we target the 55–70 'momentum sweet spot' for new entries rather than chasing extended moves.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）以0至100衡量股價的上升速度。當RSI突破70，代表股票進入「超買」區間，意味着短期內升幅過急，隨時有機會出現技術性回調或整固。今日篩選名單中，逾十隻候選股（如FOUR、EWTX、KBH、NTRA、ICLR等）的RSI均已超過70，正因如此，本組合偏好在RSI介乎55至70的「黃金動力區間」開倉，避免在高位追入而承受回調風險。
